TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cirakesay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 58 buwan, 124 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 102 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 77%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 3%, Setik 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cirakesay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Cirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cirakesay hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cirakesay hya' ga Ancoh. tay mkyahu' na Cirakesay hya' ga Monating. tay 'llaw na Cirakesay hya' ga Pacuya. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cirakesay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa anʦ~ʨoħ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa monatiŋ. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa paʦ~ʨuja. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cirakesay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 58 buwan, 124 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 102 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 77%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 3%, Setik 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cirakesay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Cirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cirakesay hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cirakesay hya' ga Ancoh. tay mkyahu' na Cirakesay hya' ga Monating. tay 'llaw na Cirakesay hya' ga Pacuya. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cirakesay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa anʦ~ʨoħ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa monatiŋ. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa paʦ~ʨuja. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
